mapper.select: SELECT su.username, su.nickname, tena.`status`, tena.sort, tena.id, tena.remark, tena.notice_id, JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'projectId', tenar.project_id, 'examAttemptType', tenar.exam_attempt_type ) ) AS project_exam_list_json FROM ted_examinee_notice_apply tena LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON tena.examinee_id = su.id LEFT JOIN ted_examinee_notice_apply_record tenar ON tena.id = tenar.apply_id AND tenar.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment} GROUP BY tena.id, su.username, su.nickname, tena.`status` ORDER BY tena.sort ASC

SELECT tp.project_code, tenar.exam_attempt_type, tenar.practical_type FROM ted_examinee_notice_apply_record tenar LEFT JOIN ted_project tp ON tenar.project_id = tp.id AND tp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tenar.apply_id = #{applyId} AND tenar.is_deleted = 0

SELECT tena.sort, tenar.plan_id, tenar.exam_attempt_type,tpc.classroom_id, tp.project_code, tep.start_time FROM ted_examinee_notice_apply tena JOIN ted_examinee_notice_apply_record tenar ON tena.id = tenar.apply_id AND tenar.is_deleted = 0 JOIN ted_plan_classroom tpc ON tenar.plan_id = tpc.plan_id JOIN ted_classroom tc ON tpc.classroom_id = tc.id AND tc.exam_type = 0 AND tc.is_deleted = 0 JOIN ted_project tp ON tenar.project_id = tp.id AND tp.is_deleted = 0 JOIN ted_exam_plan tep ON tenar.plan_id = tep.id AND tep.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tena.id = #{applyId} AND tena.is_deleted = 0
